case_title: CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION vs. BUTLER, MICHAEL AUGUST

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF THE COURT THAT THIS CASE BE FILED NUNC PRO TUNC AS NOVEMBER 9, 1994, SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS AND FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY MIZUNO, BARBARA KAZUKO
RE-ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU, FILED BY PLAINTIFF
AMENDED APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSUINTER-INSURANCE BUREAU

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSUINTER-INSURANCE BUREAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, MICHAEL AUGUST $1,960.07 PRINCIPAL, $1,304.04 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,278.11, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE 811799 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSUINTER-INSURANCE BUREAU AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, MICHAEL AUGUST
